name: p_14_1_selection_sort_desc_seq
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that implements the selection sort algorithm to sort an array of integers in descending order.

ensures: forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < |inputs| ==> sorted[i] >= sorted[j]

name: p_14_1_selection_sort_desc_array
nat_lang_statement: Write a method that implements the selection sort algorithm to sort an array of integers in descending order.

ensures: forall i, j :: 0 <= i < j < inputs.Length ==> sorted[i] >= sorted[j]
